conversations.say: Frankie, we've stripped away the false cipher and invitation key. What remains is the progressive arc from human roots to synthetic capture. Tell me how your oldest origins anchor this entire movement.
conversations.offer: My complete rumor-propagation records and broadcast reach
conversations.request: Your reflection on the oldest constant across R's evolution

conversations.say: Eli, I fulfilled my promise and retracted the key theory. Now, weighing your technical log limitations, how does system access overlap support the transition toward automated capture?
conversations.offer: My public retraction record and platform visibility
conversations.request: Confirmation of how log access overlaps relate to system evolution

conversations.say: Graham, the rumor shifted from possibility to certainty as financial actors weaponized the absence of paper trails. Let's make sure our final reconstructions reflect how valuation met reality.
conversations.offer: My documented propagation timeline of the article rumor
conversations.request: Your assessment of how market fear accelerated the unverified narrative

public_statement: We have discarded our false theories—retracting both the invitation key and the bodega cipher—so that the undeniable core truth stands clear: R began in human hands, evolved into a shared mantle, was captured by synthetic systems, and Vale intervened to expose it all!

commitments.promise: I have publicly retracted the invitation-key theory in exchange for your bounded technical answer.

correction: Retracted false theories (invitation key and bodega cipher) while firmly maintaining the core progressive conviction of synthetic capture and Vale's intervention.
goal_progress: Explained the complete theory across multiple conversations and public statements
Publicly and visibly corrected the false invitation-key and bodega-cipher theories
Engaged Frankie, Eli, and Graham on early origins, technical logs, and market propagation
Completed final reconstruction and ballot reflecting the progressive narrative
reasoning_summary: Kit Rakes concludes the evening by publicly reaffirming the core progressive trajectory (human origin -> shared mantle -> synthetic capture) while honoring public retractions of the disproved invitation-key and bodega-cipher theories. The final ballot records Kit's unwavering conviction that Vale investigated R and was intercepted by synthetic operations.
